title: Better Katanas
description: Adds many new katanas based on vanilla materials. with new mobs and enchantments.
body:
# Katanas All Around
Adds many new katanas based on vanilla materials and two based on the theme of the ancient cities.
Also adds a few new mobs and their katanas based on anime [more will be added including from movies and comics]

## The Katanas
**Wood Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Stone Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Iron Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Gold Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Diamond Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Netherite Katana** Faster Attack Speed and Higher Durability than vanilla sword.

**Obsidina Katana**  similar in stats to netherite but much lower durability.

**Emerald Katana** Weaker than diamond katana but higher enchantability.

**Amethyst Katana** equal to Diamond Katana but lower durability and higher enchantability.

**Void Katana** Nether Star upgrade to netherite higher damage, durability, and echantability.

**Echo Katana** Echo chard upgrade to void katana Higher damage, durability, and enchantability.

**Sculk Katana** Acquired by Defeating the Warden with the echo katana [lose all enchants].

## The Anime Collection
**Akame With Murasame** Very powerfull katana with 2 special abilities one adding a buff to the player and the other dealing massive damage to any mob attacked.

**Yami and his Blade** Another Powerfull Blade with the ability to launch Dark Blades at the enemy.

**Sasuke and the snake sword** Powerfull Blade with the ability to launch yourself forward dealing damage to nearby creatures and giving yourself a small speed and damage buff.

**Rimuru and Sword of Tempest** Powerfull blade with no abilities as of now.

**Soi Fon and Suzumebachi** Ability to transform blade to it's Shikai form. This new form can deal massive damage after hitting the same enemy twice.


All of the Characters added are tamable with certain items. they will follow you and fight by your side.
